summary: Iteration 99: EchoAi³ Operations Pulse + Annual Budget Engine + Labor Cost Fix. Backend: 36/36 tests PASSED (100%). All new features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Labor cost calculation fix verified: 23.2% (was 83.5% bug, now within 15-35% industry standard)
EchoAi³ Ops Pulse analyze endpoint returns all 7 departments (rooms, food_beverage, concierge, engineering, spa, financial, purchasing)
Budget engine has all 17 drivers with proper structure (id, name, category, unit, default, min, max)
What-if scenario correctly shows +$498,559 (+7.6%) revenue increase with ADR=318 vs baseline ADR=289
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 99 tested new EchoAi³ Operations Pulse and Annual Budget Engine features. All endpoints working: GET /api/echoai3/ops-pulse/analyze (hotel_score, 7 departments, alerts, recommendations, insights, overall_health), GET /api/echoai3/ops-pulse/guidance (top_actions, departments_needing_attention), GET /api/echoai3/ops-pulse/history, GET /api/budget/drivers (17 drivers), POST /api/budget/compute (12-month budget), POST /api/budget/what-if, POST /api/budget/save, GET /api/budget/saved, GET /api/budget/seasonality. Labor cost fix verified: 23.2% (was 83.5%). Chef daily report shows non-zero covers from real guest_orders + IRD data.
